title: Surgeon Vacancy at Zydus Lifesciences - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Zydus Lifesciences - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Zydus Lifesciences has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Hyderabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Zydus Lifesciences:
Zydus Lifesciences is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zydus Lifesciences!
